inline_comments.message: specified snapshot not created under job#588 (change jobnumber or update snapshot)
job #588 is generating 1.0.8-20220907T035122Z. Update this to job# which generates 1.0.9-20220908T062215Z (or you can pick any latest job and use the snapshot for release once tested)

May I know where I can find the snapshot image being generated? I had checked in the nexus build logs - https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/dcaegen2-services-kpi-computation-ms-maven-stage-master/588 , but couldn't find it. In case I'm using a latest job, where can I fetch the snapshot image from?

You should be looking into https://jenkins.onap.org/view/dcaegen2/job/dcaegen2-services-kpi-computation-ms-maven-docker-stage-master/ job logs (which is identified in line#4 also and not the "docker" in job name)
This is different from dcaegen2-services-kpi-computation-ms-maven-stage-master which only generates/pushes maven artifact.
Could you confirm if this snapshot was verified locally? Noticed issues with SON-handler and Slice-Analysis after vulnerability updates and had to revert back some lib version.

I wasn't able to test the release image version because of the following issue I found in the logs, I think its due to this change - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/services/+/130628
